case_title: DEBORAH CARNEY VS. SONNY TAN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA C. HO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.
